hero.title: Professional Civic Dashboard
hero.subtitle: 24/7 Civic Monitoring Available
hero.description: From complaint tracking to real-time civic issue monitoring, UnIgnored helps citizens report, monitor, and resolve public problems faster with complete transparency.

about.title: About UnIgnored
about.missionText: Empowering citizens and local authorities to build better communities through transparency and rapid response.
about.visionText: A future where every civic issue is heard, tracked, and resolved with digital precision.

features.trackDesc: Monitor the status of your complaints from submission to resolution.
features.verifyDesc: Dedicated professionals assigned to handle each specific category of issues.
features.analyticsDesc: Data-driven insights to help city planners prioritize urban repairs.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Have questions about UnIgnored? Our team is here to help you navigate the platform and ensure your voice is heard.
